RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Document owner: Project team. Current as of 2026-04-15.

Version history:
- v1.0 (2026-03-28): initial log at kickoff. 6 entries.
- v1.1 (2026-04-04): added R-02 (engineer leave). Converted A-01 to risk after vendor call.
- v1.2 (2026-04-11): closed I-01. Added I-02 (HL7 drops).
- v1.3 (2026-04-15): R-03 downgraded after PO sync. Added R-05.

===== RISKS =====

R-01 [OPEN since v1.0]
  Vendor API v2 deprecation.
  Impact: High.
  Likelihood: High.
  Owner: PM.
  Mitigation: Monitor closely. Escalate if needed.

R-02 [OPEN, added v1.1]
  Lead engineer unavailable.
  Impact: Medium.
  Likelihood: Certain.
  Owner: Eng team.
  Mitigation: Follow up.

R-03 [OPEN, downgraded v1.3]
  Premature expansion to clinics B+C.
  Impact: High → Medium.
  Likelihood: Medium → Low.
  Owner: PM.
  Mitigation: Discuss with PO.

R-04 [OPEN since v1.0]
  Scope creep.
  Impact: Medium.
  Likelihood: Medium.
  Owner: PM.
  Mitigation: Keep an eye on it.

R-05 [NEW in v1.3]
  Steering committee KPI change.
  Impact: Medium.
  Likelihood: Medium.
  Owner: Project team.
  Mitigation: Prep dashboard.

===== ISSUES =====

I-01 [CLOSED v1.2]
  Three unplanned integration endpoints.
  Resolution: QA plan accepted 2026-04-11.

I-02 [OPEN, added v1.2]
  HL7 lab feed intermittent drops.
  Owner: IT.
  Mitigation: Submit early. Review with vendor.

===== ASSUMPTIONS =====

A-01 [CLOSED v1.1]
  Vendor SM availability was not confirmed in writing; converted to R-01 after vendor call.

A-02 [OPEN]
  Clinic A staff will complete training before expansion.
  Owner: Training lead.
  Mitigation: Send reminders.

===== DEPENDENCIES =====

D-01 [OPEN since v1.0]
  Vendor support during cutover weekend.
  Owner: Vendor.
  Mitigation: Coordinate.

D-02 [OPEN since v1.0]
  Internal IT for network cutover.
  Owner: IT.
  Mitigation: Plan ahead.
